issues.original_text: Speed of Light, Distributed Shared Memory, GPC Floorsweeps
issues.description: The translation contains duplicated parentheses, likely due to a search-and-replace error during drafting (e.g., `理论极限性能 (Speed of Light, SoL)（Speed of Light (SoL)）` and `GPC 核心屏蔽 (Floorsweeping)（Floorsweeping）`).
issues.why_it_matters: Duplicated annotations make the text look unpolished and disrupt reading flow.
issues.suggestion: Remove the redundant parentheses. Change to: `理论极限性能 (Speed of Light, SoL)、分布式共享内存 (DSMEM)、GPC 核心屏蔽 (Floorsweeping)`

issues.description: The English conjunction 'and' was left untranslated in the phrase `PTX and SASS 指令级别`.
issues.why_it_matters: Leaving basic English conjunctions in a Chinese sentence breaks the immersion and looks like an incomplete translation.
issues.suggestion: Change `PTX and SASS` to `PTX 和 SASS`.
